parsed.production_notes: The top half features an AI-generated avatar with an unnaturally smooth face, static posture, and futuristic metallic accessories that blend oddly with her clothing. The bottom half is a human-recorded video with natural lighting, realistic skin texture, and typical home background elements.

characters.appearance: Female, appearing in her 20s, flawless light complexion, dark hair styled up. She has a slightly robotic but friendly demeanor.
characters.wardrobe: White saree with a gold border, paired with futuristic metallic neck and arm accessories.

characters.appearance: Female, 20s-30s, medium Indian complexion, dark hair tied back, wearing round wire-rimmed glasses.
characters.wardrobe: Red and black plaid button-down shirt with a leopard print scarf draped around her neck.
characters.demeanor: Initially concerned and frustrated, transitioning to curious and hopeful.

scenes.setting: Top: Futuristic city balcony. Bottom: Plain indoor room.

panels.panel_visual_description: A medium close-up of Character A seated in a modern chair on a balcony. She has a smooth, flawless complexion and dark hair styled up. She is wearing a white saree with a gold border, along with futuristic metallic accessories including a wide neckpiece and armbands. She holds a translucent, light blue tablet-like object. The background shows a futuristic cityscape with tall, sleek skyscrapers under a clear sky. The lighting is bright and even.

A medium close-up of Character B positioned indoors against a plain, off-white wall. She has a medium complexion, dark hair tied back, and wears round, wire-rimmed glasses. She is dressed in a red and black plaid button-down shirt and a leopard print scarf draped around her neck. A white electrical switchboard is visible on the wall behind her to the left. The lighting is natural and slightly uneven.

scenes.visual_description: A continuous split-screen shot with a horizontal division. The top panel displays an AI-generated woman in a futuristic setting, acting as a tutor. The bottom panel shows a human woman in a realistic home setting, acting as the learner. The two characters appear to be having a back-and-forth conversation. A static text banner runs across the very top of the video, and dynamic captions appear in the center of the screen.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: मैंने बोला मुझे नौकरी करनी है तो हस्बैंड ने बोला जॉब के लिए इंग्लिश की जरूरत होती है। तुम तो हिंदी मीडियम से हो बस बच्चे का ख्याल रखो बोल दिया। [I said I want to work, so my husband said English is needed for a job. You are from a Hindi medium background, just take care of the child, he said.]

Character A says: कोई बात नहीं तुम अभी भी इंग्लिश सीख सकते हो मेरे साथ। [No problem, you can still learn English with me.]

Character B says: पर कैसे सीखूं काम के बीच में टाइम ही नहीं मिलता। [But how do I learn, I don't get time amidst work.]

Character A says: मैं SPEAKX की AI हूं बस दिन में 10 मिनट मेरे साथ प्रैक्टिस करो फिर देखो कैसे हर जगह कॉन्फिडेंस के साथ फर्स्ट क्लास इंग्लिश बोलते हो। तुम मुझसे हिंदी में बात करके भी इंग्लिश सीख सकते हो। [I am SPEAKX's AI, just practice with me for 10 minutes a day, then see how you speak first-class English everywhere with confidence. You can also learn English by talking to me in Hindi.]

Character B says: सच में इसके लिए मुझे क्या करना पड़ेगा। [Really, what do I have to do for this?]

Character A says: बस SPEAKX ऐप डाउनलोड करो ये इंग्लिश सीखने के लिए नंबर वन ऐप है मेरे जैसे AI टीचर्स के साथ दो हफ्तों में फर्राटेदार इंग्लिश बोलना शुरू कर दोगे। [Just download the SPEAKX app, this is the number one app for learning English. With AI teachers like me, you will start speaking fluent English in two weeks.]
scenes.on_screen_text: Hindi Medium Housewife Bhi Ab Jaldi Confident English Bol Rahi Hai. (Even a Hindi medium housewife is now speaking confident English quickly.) [Dynamic captions matching the spoken dialogue appear throughout.]
